2605.30233.title: Do Language Models Track Entities Across State Changes?
2605.30233.paper_summary: Entity tracking (ET), the ability to keep track of states, is a fundamental skill that underlies complex reasoning. An increasing amount of work investigates how transformer language models (LMs) solve entity binding $\textit{without}$ state changes. However, there is limited understanding of how non-toy LMs address ET problems of realistic difficulties expressed in natural language. To this end, we investigate the mechanisms underlying ET in more complex scenarios featuring multiple state-changing operations. We find that LMs do not incrementally track world states across tokens or query-relevant states across layers, but simply aggregate relevant information in parallel at the last token when the query becomes evident. We further investigate mechanisms of individual operations ($\texttt{PUT}$, $\texttt{REMOVE}$, $\texttt{MOVE}$) to characterize this non-incremental ET mechanism. Surprisingly, LMs implement the $\texttt{REMOVE}$ operation with a fragile global suppression tag; this global removal mechanism predicts various failure modes that we confirm behaviorally. We provide a mechanistic solution of nullifying this tag to partially address this issue. Overall, our findings reveal that LMs solve a fundamentally sequential task using a non-sequential strategy. More broadly, our work illustrates how behavioral and mechanistic analyses can fruitfully interact. Behavioral results inform mechanistic hypotheses, and insights from mechanistic analyses help build stronger behavioral evaluations by predicting failure modes missing from existing evaluations.
2605.30233.paper_summary_zh: 實體追蹤（ET），即保持狀態的能力，是支撐複雜推理的基本技能。越來越多的研究探討了Transformer語言模型（LMs）如何在沒有狀態變化的情況下解決實體綁定問題。然而，對於非玩具型LMs如何處理用自然語言表達的現實困難的ET問題，理解仍然有限。為此，我們研究了在涉及多個狀態變化操作的更複雜場景中，ET的基本機制。我們發現，LMs並不會在標記之間逐步追蹤世界狀態或在層之間查詢相關狀態，而是在查詢變得明顯時，僅在最後一個標記上並行聚合相關信息。我們進一步研究了個別操作（$\texttt{PUT}$、$\texttt{REMOVE}$、$\texttt{MOVE}$）的機制，以特徵化這一非逐步ET機制。令人驚訝的是，LMs使用脆弱的全局抑制標籤來實現$\texttt{REMOVE}$操作；這一全局移除機制預測了各種失效模式，我們在行為上進行了確認。我們提供了一種機械解決方案，即使這一標籤無效，以部分解決此問題。總體而言，我們的發現揭示了LMs使用非順序策略解決根本上順序的任務。更廣泛地說，我們的工作說明了行為和機械分析如何有效互動。行為結果為機械假設提供信息，而機械分析的見解則有助於通過預測現有評估中缺失的失效模式來建立更強的行為評估。
2605.30233.author: Zilu Tang et.al.
2605.30233.authors: Zilu Tang, Qiao Zhao, Gabriel Franco, Derry Wijaya, Aaron Mueller, Sebastian Schuster, Najoung Kim
